method: Generated single source of truth. Website pages display this JSON and do not calculate separate bullpen scores in the browser.
note: v3 runs-aware formula. Reliever counts are context only and do not add hidden score points.
formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

teams.label: High risk
teams.workload_read: Heavy recent workload. Late-game pitching condition could materially affect the read.
teams.score_reason: High risk (8.8/10): 12.7 relief innings over the last three days — 6 of them in the last game, 3 arms pitched back-to-back days. 12 reliever appearances in the window. Workload only — see efficiency for how well the pen has actually pitched.
teams.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6)
teams.efficiency_reason: Average (5.2/10): 2.84 ERA and 1.74 WHIP over 12.7 relief innings (4 ER, 13 H, 9 BB) in the last three days.
teams.efficiency_formula: 50 - clamp((ERA - 4.20) x 6, -25, 25) x confidence - clamp((WHIP - 1.30) x 15, -20, 20) x confidence, confidence = clamp(BP IP / 6, 0.35, 1)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.
